_comment: Oracle for the functional suite's typed JSON helpers (json_helpers_test.go).
Synthetic corpus x expected output. Expectations were generated from the
retired in-suite jq emulator (proven byte-equivalent to the bash suite's
real-jq output on the live CI sections) and cross-checked against real
jq 1.8.1; deliberate divergences are documented in the generator's
realjq, merge) or hand-edit a case when a helper's contract changes.
